changeSet.author: nsagon
changeSet.sql:
-- Flag storage files of the soon-to-be-deleted tenant documents for deletion WITH to_delete AS ( SELECT id FROM public.document WHERE tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') AND id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (d2.tenant_id, d2.document_category) d2.id FROM public.document d2 WHERE d2.tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND d2.document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') ORDER BY d2.tenant_id, d2.document_category, CASE d2.document_status WHEN 'DECLINED' THEN 3 WHEN 'TO_PROCESS' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END DESC, d2.id DESC ) ) UPDATE public.storage_file SET status = 'TO_DELETE' WHERE id IN ( SELECT watermark_file_id FROM public.document WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM to_delete) AND watermark_file_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT storage_file_id FROM public.file WHERE document_id IN (SELECT id FROM to_delete) AND storage_file_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT preview_file_id FROM public.file WHERE document_id IN (SELECT id FROM to_delete) AND preview_file_id IS NOT NULL );
-- Delete duplicate tenant documents, keeping the most severe status then the highest id DELETE FROM public.document WHERE tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') AND id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (d2.tenant_id, d2.document_category) d2.id FROM public.document d2 WHERE d2.tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND d2.document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') ORDER BY d2.tenant_id, d2.document_category, CASE d2.document_status WHEN 'DECLINED' THEN 3 WHEN 'TO_PROCESS' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END DESC, d2.id DESC );

changeSet.author: nsagon
changeSet.sql:
-- Flag storage files of the soon-to-be-deleted guarantor documents for deletion WITH to_delete AS ( SELECT id FROM public.document WHERE guarantor_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') AND id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (d2.guarantor_id, d2.document_category) d2.id FROM public.document d2 WHERE d2.guarantor_id IS NOT NULL AND d2.document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') ORDER BY d2.guarantor_id, d2.document_category, CASE d2.document_status WHEN 'DECLINED' THEN 3 WHEN 'TO_PROCESS' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END DESC, d2.id DESC ) ) UPDATE public.storage_file SET status = 'TO_DELETE' WHERE id IN ( SELECT watermark_file_id FROM public.document WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM to_delete) AND watermark_file_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT storage_file_id FROM public.file WHERE document_id IN (SELECT id FROM to_delete) AND storage_file_id IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT preview_file_id FROM public.file WHERE document_id IN (SELECT id FROM to_delete) AND preview_file_id IS NOT NULL );
-- Delete duplicate guarantor documents, keeping the most severe status then the highest id DELETE FROM public.document WHERE guarantor_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') AND id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (d2.guarantor_id, d2.document_category) d2.id FROM public.document d2 WHERE d2.guarantor_id IS NOT NULL AND d2.document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL') ORDER BY d2.guarantor_id, d2.document_category, CASE d2.document_status WHEN 'DECLINED' THEN 3 WHEN 'TO_PROCESS' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END DESC, d2.id DESC );

changeSet.author: nsagon
changeSet.sql: -- Create unique index concurrently for tenants CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS uq_tenant_single_document_category ON public.document (tenant_id, document_category) WHERE tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL');

changeSet.author: nsagon
changeSet.sql: -- Create unique index concurrently for guarantors CREATE UNIQUE INDEX CONCURRENTLY IF NOT EXISTS uq_guarantor_single_document_category ON public.document (guarantor_id, document_category) WHERE guarantor_id IS NOT NULL AND document_category IN ('TAX', 'RESIDENCY', 'IDENTIFICATION', 'PROFESSIONAL');
